recommendations.title: The Disappearance of Alice Creed
recommendations.overview: A rich man's daughter is held captive in an abandoned apartment by two former convicts who abducted her and hold her ransom in exchange for her father's money.

recommendations.title: The Girl Who Escaped: The Kara Robinson Story
recommendations.overview: Based on a true story. 15-year-old Kara Robinson was kidnapped, assaulted and held captive for 18 hours. With her survival instincts kicking in, she plots a daring escape from the serial killer and leads police to his apartment.

recommendations.title: Laid to Rest
recommendations.overview: A young girl wakes up in a casket with a head injury and no memory of her identity. She quickly realizes she was abducted by a serial killer and she must fight to survive.

recommendations.title: Shut In
recommendations.overview: A young single mother is held captive along with her two children by a violent ex and must plot their escape before it’s too late.

recommendations.title: The Tripper
recommendations.overview: A Ronald Reagan-obsessed serial killer targets a bunch of hippies who are heading to a weekend-long concert.

recommendations.title: Girl in the Box
recommendations.overview: The true story of 20-year-old Colleen Stan, a hitchhiking woman abducted by a young couple and held captive for seven years, during which time she's tortured and forced to live as a slave to her captors.

recommendations.title: Tau
recommendations.overview: Held captive in a futuristic smart house, a woman hopes to escape by befriending the A.I. program that controls the house.

recommendations.title: Room
recommendations.overview: Held captive for 7 years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

recommendations.title: Shark Attack 3: Megalodon
recommendations.overview: When two researchers discover a colossal shark's tooth off the Mexican coast their worst fears surface - the most menacing beast to ever rule the waters is still alive and mercilessly feeding on anything that crosses its path. Now they must hunt the

recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.
